programme.title: Emmerdale
programme.desc: Moira breaks down, Mackenzie is suspicious, and Chas tells Cain to get revenge

programme.title: Coronation Street
programme.desc: Carla attempts to set Adam and Sarah up by inviting them both to lunch, and hints if all goes well she has a spare hotel room for them for the night. Meanwhile, Todd lands Paul in trouble at Underworld, and Craig feels uneasy at Ray offering Faye a promotion

programme.title: Paul O'Grady's Great British Escape
programme.desc: In a new six-part series, Paul O'Grady shares the beautiful sights, stories and secrets of his beloved adopted home county, Kent. This time, Paul hops on the Romney, Hythe and Dymchurch Railway, a beautiful miniature steam train that runs along the picturesque Kent coastline. Arriving in Dungeness, Paul heads to the RSPB nature reserve, before travelling to Dungeness beach, the largest expanse of shingle anywhere in Europe. Finally, Paul heads inland to the heart of the Romney Marshes, where he meets another unexpected local resident - a unlikely herd of alpacas

programme.title: Coronation Street
programme.desc: Abi confronts Peter in the Rovers' back yard and reveals how Barry let slip that he's been on the whisky. Paul remains oblivious to Todd's manipulations, and Ray warns Craig to keep his mouth shut

programme.title: I'm a Celebrity Get Me Out of Here!
programme.desc: Day four and contestants continue to cope with life at Gwrych Castle. As usual there has been plenty of drama over the past 24 hours, and Ant and Dec give us the lowdown on some of the highs and lows, as well as dropping more bombshells for those hungry celebrities

programme.title: Peston
programme.desc: Political magazine show presented by Robert Peston, featuring major interviews with MPs, topical guests and cultural figures. Including updates from social media taking in perspectives from viewers, experts and key players throughout the programme

programme.title: UEFA Nations League Highlights
programme.desc: Mark Pougatch presents action from the latest fixtures, including England v Iceland at Wembley Stadium, Israel v Scotland at Netanya Stadium, Wales v Finland at Cardiff City Stadium, and Northern Ireland v Romania at Windsor Park and Republic of Ireland v Bulgaria at Aviva Stadium. With analysis from Roy Keane and Ian Wright

programme.title: James Martin's American Adventure
programme.desc: This time, the chef's culinary journey takes him to The Hamptons. First, James learns about the area's rich farming history and visits Amber Waves Farm to cook a pizza using local, seasonal produce. Then, the chef pays a visit to seafood restaurant The Dock House in Sag Harbour , where he samples their famous chowder

programme.desc: Peter tries to reassure Simon over the Oliver situation, but when Carla has a conflicting view, they become embroiled in a nasty argument, and Carla is left stung. Meanwhile, Leanne tries to persuade Steve to change his mind, and Craig gains an insight into Ray's grand plan

programme.title: Ainsley's Food We Love
programme.desc: Ainsley Harriott prepares a selection of retro dishes inspired by classics of the past, including minced beef, potato and onion pie, served with buttery greens, and finishes off with a queen of puddings. Plus, chef Brian Turner reveals why faggots deserve a comeback

programme.title: Coronation Street
programme.desc: After having his taxi stolen, a shaken Peter gives in to his demons. Meanwhile, Ray attempts to buy Craig's silence over the development, and Todd takes a cynical view of Sean's new venture

programme.title: I'm a Celebrity Get Me Out of Here!

programme.title: ITV News at Ten
programme.desc: A fresh perspective on the major stories of the day, featuring national and international news, with reports and analysis from ITV's correspondents

programme.title: The Millennium Dome Heist with Ross Kemp
programme.desc: The actor reveals the story of the nine-month game of cat-and-mouse between police and a criminal gang intent on stealing diamonds worth £350 million from the Millennium Dome in London in November 2000

programme.title: The Diana Interview: Revenge of a Princess
programme.desc: The conclusion of the two-part documentary examines how the Princess of Wales' 1995 Panorama interview created scandal and division within the BBC itself, leading to a serious rift in the higher echelons of the corporation. The programme examines suggestions that Diana's involvement was gained through the use of fake documents, and features contributions from a graphic designer at the centre of the allegations

programme.title: All Elite Wrestling: Dynamite
programme.desc: Hard-hitting action from the world of All Elite Wrestling, featuring all of the biggest stars on the roster, including Adam Page, Chris Jericho, Cody and Jon Moxley.

programme.title: Back to Mine
programme.desc: Dating show in which singletons hunt for a potential partner by rifling through three different homes. Yorkshire lass Cheryl takes along her best friend Danielle as she checks out a trio of homes. She has a habit of dating bad boys and is keen to break this trend. Will she find her perfect match in the lads' pad, the swish flat or the rustic farm retreat? Narrated by Rochelle Humes

programme.title: Winning Combination
programme.desc: Quiz, hosted by Omid Djalili, in which nine contestants are assigned a number between one and nine. They are then whittled down to a final four, and the combination of numbers they are assigned represents the size of the jackpot they play to win in a final round

programme.title: Tipping Point
programme.desc: Ben Shephard hosts the quiz in which contestants answer questions to win turns on an arcade-style machine. Dropping tokens down a choice of four chutes, they hope to knock piles of them off a moving shelf - and the more they collect, the greater the prize fund. The player who has won the least amount is then eliminated, and the last one standing competes for a £10,000 jackpot

programme.title: The Chase
programme.desc: Bradley Walsh presents as contestants Andi, Sarah, Ernest and Nicola, who have never met before, pit their wits against one of the ruthless Chasers in the hope of winning a potential prize pot worth thousands of pounds. They work as a team and play strategically to answer general knowledge questions against the clock and race down the game board to the exit without being caught

programme.title: Emmerdale

programme.title: Catchphrase

After the first elimination, the two remaining players battle to reach the Super Catchphrase round, where one of them could win £50,000

programme.title: How to Spend It Well at Christmas with Phillip Schofield
programme.desc: The presenter provides festive consumer advice beginning with a guide to toys. He visits a school to see if the classic Rubik's Cube can compete with modern equivalents. Christopher Biggins joins a group of families to test out the latest board games, Angellica Bell and Dallas Campbell test out new educational toys for different age ranges, and Dancing on Ice's Matt Evers road tests inline skates. Plus, consumer journalist Harry Wallop presents a guide to advent calendars

programme.title: Paul O'Grady's Great British Escape
programme.desc: In a new six-part series, Paul O'Grady shares the beautiful sights, stories and secrets of his beloved adopted home county, Kent. This time, Paul hops on the Romney, Hythe and Dymchurch Railway, a beautiful miniature steam train that runs along the picturesque Kent coastline. Arriving in Dungeness, Paul heads to the RSPB nature reserve, before travelling to Dungeness beach, the largest expanse of shingle anywhere in Europe. Finally, Paul heads inland to the heart of the Romney Marshes, where he meets another unexpected local resident - a unlikely herd of alpacas

John Nettles and Jason Hughes star

programme.title: Inspector Morse
programme.desc: The fatal poisoning of a deaconess who was about to become Oxford's first female chaplain makes Morse wonder whether the city's conservative clerics could be hiding a deadly secret. Further investigation uncovers a connection between the murder and a weight loss clinic. John Thaw stars, with Kevin Whately and Zoe Wanamaker (My Family)

programme.title: Doc Martin
programme.desc: Martin's medical career remains under scrutiny, as a GMC representative arrives to assess him and his surgery, while having resigned from her job as headmistress at the local school, Louisa pursues a new career in child counselling. Elsewhere, Al accidentally proposes to Morwenna, and Mrs Tishell has a new lease on life

programme.title: Endeavour
programme.desc: The detective has been assigned to a quiet rural area in 1969, and finds himself back in uniform. However, he is reunited with his former CID colleagues when he discovers the body of a missing schoolgirl. Endeavour quickly finds a likely suspect, and is offered the chance to regain his lost status by making an arrest - but Thursday convinces him the man is innocent

programme.title: Grantchester
programme.desc: The year 1956 finds jazz-loving clergyman Sidney Chambers attending a talk by Reverend Nathaniel Todd, a member of the formative US civil rights movement. During the event, protestors disrupt the speech and release fireworks, causing the audience to panic. In the chaos, Todd's son Charles is stabbed and killed by an unseen assailant. The murder sees racial tensions spike and Geordie Keating is called in to investigate. Things are further complicated when Sidney finds himself drawn to passionate young activist, and their tentative romance faces pressure from all sides. Robson Green stars, with James Norton, Tessa Peake-Jones, Samuel West and Paterson Joseph

programme.title: Inspector Morse
programme.desc: Mischievous artist Harry Field, who specialises in preparing bogus coats of arms for gullible American tourists, is murdered - and Morse takes a personal interest in finding the culprit. But as investigations progress, he discovers the victim was not quite the lovable rogue he initially appeared. John Thaw stars, with Kevin Whately, Geraldine James and Freddie Jones

programme.desc: Gary does not know how to cope with grieving Judy. Liz is shocked when Jacqui turns up at Fraser's flat. Deirdre tells Liz she is a fool for still wanting to be with Fraser

programme.title: Classic Coronation Street

programme.title: Classic Emmerdale
programme.desc: Jack is angry when he finds out Billy has been writing to Andy. Daniels tells Steve that he has video evidence of Kim setting up the murder of the lady in the lake

programme.title: Heartbeat
programme.desc: A Frenchwoman arrives to help with preparations for Aidensfield's twinning with her home town, but things go wrong when she is left to the tender mercies of Peggy. Rob marks his return to the village by saving a con-man after his car crashes into the river, while district nurse Carol Cassidy struggles to treat a woman with an over-protective husband. Jonathan Kerrigan and Lisa Kay star

programme.title: Bless This House
programme.desc: Betty asks her neighbours to babysit, but Sid is less than keen to help. Comedy, starring Sid James and Patsy Rowlands

programme.title: Bless This House
programme.desc: Sid is delighted when Mike announces his intention to marry into wealth - until a close link between the two families is uncovered

programme.title: That's My Boy
programme.desc: Attempts to scare off Robert's other mother leave him little to crow about

programme.title: The Darling Buds of May
programme.desc: Part one of two. Pop busies himself organising a christening while awaiting the birth of his first grandchild - and still finds time to cast a beady eye over the contents of an elderly widow's home. Whimsical rural drama, starring David Jason, Pam Ferris, Philip Franks and Catherine Zeta-Jones

programme.title: The Durrells
programme.desc: Louisa tries to raise some money by selling homemade food, which attracts the attention of another Englishman. However, a former lover threatens the family's idyllic existence. Gerry comes up with a plan to breed otters, Leslie accidentally shoots Roger, and Margo considers becoming a nun. Return of the drama series based on Gerald Durrell's books, starring Keeley Hawes

programme.title: Heartbeat
programme.desc: A recently released ex-convict who served time for the rape of a local girl becomes the target of a hate campaign - prompting Rob to point the finger of suspicion at the victim's family. The bobby is shocked when old acquaintance DS Rachel Dawson arrives in Aidensfield on the trail of an escaped prisoner, while Peggy accidentally knocks down an old friend with her car. Jonathan Kerrigan stars

programme.title: Classic Emmerdale
programme.desc: The Dingles take Zak to meet his birthday present. Marlon hears Nigel Hibbert is coming to the tearooms. Kim is disappointed when Steve does not give her the video

programme.title: Classic Emmerdale
programme.desc: Marlon confronts Butch about the rock that was thrown through the caravan window. Steve puts the video in a safety deposit box, and Kim asks him to move in with her

programme.title: Classic Coronation Street
programme.desc: Gerry keeps Liz, Jim and Andy at gunpoint, and the neighbours are stunned when a gunshot comes from number 11. Des and Samantha go to the airfield to do their parachute jump

programme.title: Classic Coronation Street
programme.desc: Jack enjoys looking after Brad but Vera feels Tricia takes advantage of him too much. Alf takes his driving test, and Fiona rows with Alan for putting Liz in danger

programme.title: Midsomer Murders
programme.desc: A mischievous trickster finally gets his comeuppance when his body is found floating below the weir in Midsomer Deverell. The extent of his double life starts to emerge when three family friends and a long-lost niece produce wills claiming his fortune, and his collection of erotic photographs from the 1960s gives Barnaby and Jones the key to the tangled relationships and feuds blighting the family

programme.title: Inspector Morse
programme.desc: Mischievous artist Harry Field, who specialises in preparing bogus coats of arms for gullible American tourists, is murdered - and Morse takes a personal interest in finding the culprit. But as investigations progress, he discovers the victim was not quite the lovable rogue he initially appeared. John Thaw stars, with Kevin Whately, Geraldine James and Freddie Jones

programme.title: Doc Martin
programme.desc: Martin's GMC report requires he passes three refresher courses which will then decide whether he is deemed fit to practice, starting with phlebotomy. Meanwhile, Louisa focuses on her new career as a child and adolescent counsellor. Much to Bert's dismay, Al hires Caitlin, and confesses to his accidental proposal

programme.title: Endeavour
programme.desc: Shaun Evans directs this episode, set against the backdrop of the first moon landings in 1969. The detective investigates the deaths of an astrophysicist and his girlfriend in a tragic car accident as the rest of the world eagerly awaits news from Apollo 11. When he begins to suspect foul play, Endeavour enlists Thursday's help in getting to the truth, visiting the observatory where the dead man worked and discovering the possibility that he was not the intended victim. The case is complicated further when the dead scientist is revealed to have been part of a mysterious cult-like group

programme.title: Grantchester
programme.desc: With Violet gone, Sidney loses himself in drink. After a heavy whiskey session leaves him without his jacket - and little memory of the night before - he discovers to his horror that he was the last person to see a young woman alive. As he struggles to remember her final words, Geordie grows concerned - both for the murdered girl, so callously abandoned outside a local slum, and for his friend's troubled state of mind. James Norton stars, with Robson Green, Tessa Peake-Jones, Al Weaver and Kacey Ainsworth

programme.title: Inspector Morse
programme.desc: The Oxford sleuth investigates a double mystery connected to the local Greek community - the death of a restaurant chef and the disappearance of a baby - and wonders whether an academic event attended by some of the university's leading classical scholars could shed light on the case. Mystery, starring John Thaw and Kevin Whately, with Jan Harvey, Martin Jarvis and James Hazeldine

programme.title: Bless This House
programme.desc: Sid forgets an important party - unfortunately the occasion is his silver wedding anniversary. Sid James stars

programme.title: Bless This House
programme.desc: Sid's tries to join the pop scene make him a laughing stock and he realises the generation gap is wider than ever

programme.title: That's My Boy
programme.desc: Ida's birthday celebrations give her the blues, and even Wilfred's arrival doesn't make her any happier

programme.title: The Darling Buds of May
programme.desc: Part two of two. Preparations get under way for the christening, while Primrose loses her heart to a very confused vicar. Pop gets a black eye, Edith Pilchester tackles a gang of roving Teddy boys and Mademoiselle Dupont begins to feel ill. Drama, starring David Jason, Pam Ferris and Catherine Zeta-Jones

programme.title: The Durrells
programme.desc: Larry's latest novel is being published in England - but his siblings do not seem to be very impressed, his mother is more concerned with baking food to sell at the market, and even his attempts to show off in a local bar go unnoticed. Louisa attempts to make it up to him by organising a public reading. Leslie overhears Pavlos explaining to Margo how he makes liquor out of kumquats, and decides to launch a business venture brewing his own - but his sister does not approve of stealing the monk's recipe

programme.title: Heartbeat
programme.desc: A Russian trawlerman found hiding in a local woman's shed is accused of being a spy by a Home Office official (The Office star Patrick Baladi) - but Walker and Carol discover the government worker has secrets of his own to hide. Peggy turns detective after an old note found among a dead friend's belongings raises questions about her husband's disappearance. With Jonathan Kerrigan and Lisa Kay

programme.title: Classic Emmerdale
programme.desc: Zoe warns Paddy to stop spending time up at Outhwaite's farm. Kelly confides in Mandy that she might be pregnant. Kim tells Steve her version of events about the video

programme.title: Classic Emmerdale
programme.desc: Mandy tries to convince Kelly to tell Biff about the baby. Biff wants to make his peace with the Glovers. Zoe watches the video of Kim and Daniels

programme.title: Classic Coronation Street
programme.desc: Ken is astounded to be told Sue has resigned and left the school. Liz meets with Fraser and agrees to give him an alibi for the night of the warehouse raid

programme.title: Classic Coronation Street
programme.desc: Long-running drama with the residents of England's most famous cobbled street

programme.title: Midsomer Murders
programme.desc: When a family glassware business collapses following the death of one of its partners, Barnaby investigates allegations of financial irregularities, love triangles and a string of murders. Lapsed Freemason Jones uses his inside knowledge to explore the ceremonial aspects of two killings, but it is Cully's production of Hamlet that gives Tom the key to the mystery. John Nettles, Jason Hughes, Jane Wymark and Laura Howard star

programme.title: Inspector Morse
programme.desc: The Oxford sleuth investigates a double mystery connected to the local Greek community - the death of a restaurant chef and the disappearance of a baby - and wonders whether an academic event attended by some of the university's leading classical scholars could shed light on the case. Mystery, starring John Thaw and Kevin Whately, with Jan Harvey, Martin Jarvis and James Hazeldine

programme.title: Doc Martin
programme.desc: Ruth is concerned about becoming increasingly forgetful, and is even more perturbed when Martin offers to perform a mini mental state examination. It confirms she is showing early signs of dementia. Meanwhile, Louisa plans a special evening to celebrate Martin's birthday, and Al decides to throw Morwenna a surprise engagement party on the same night. There are also problems when Louisa's class tutorial ends in disaster. Comedy drama, starring Martin Clunes, Caroline Catz and Eileen Atkins

programme.title: Endeavour
programme.desc: The detective is assigned to investigate when a chocolate factory owner is murdered during a fox hunt. The case leads him to the sleepy Oxfordshire village of Chigton Green, and is soon complicated by the fatal shooting of a local couple with an apparent connection to the first victim. Endeavour uncovers a vicious campaign of gossip and rumour, and meets a local woman who inspires him to consider his future

programme.title: Grantchester
programme.desc: Geordie suspects foul play when computer laboratory head Professor Simms keels over and dies from mercury poisoning. It seems the deceased recently spent the night in the lab with someone other than his wife, possibly a fellow educated man. Geordie seeks advice from Leonard, and the pair start to uncover the surprisingly messy love lives of Simms' colleagues. Elsewhere, Cathy is brutally tricked, Will returns to Grantchester and Mrs C makes a shocking discovery. Drama, starring Robson Green and Tom Brittney

programme.title: Inspector Morse
programme.desc: Lewis joins Morse on a trip to Australia, but it is no holiday - they are pursuing a former supergrass who holds the key to a mystery back in Oxford. Going deep into the heart of the Outback, Morse soon begins to miss the comforts of home, particularly his regular tipple, although Lewis finds he has more in common with his Aussie brethren than he thought. Crime drama, starring John Thaw, Kevin Whately and Con O'Neill

programme.title: Emmerdale
programme.desc: Omnibus. Bear is exasperated with Paddy, Lydia is shocked at Nate's admission, and Vinny is uneasy with Mandy's idea

programme.desc: Text-based information service

programme.title: Classic Coronation Street
programme.desc: Audrey tells Gail that Roy will ruin the cafe. Alf warns Ken that he has had a complaint over his affair with Sue. Chris Collins asks Kevin for work at the garage

programme.title: Classic Coronation Street
programme.desc: Fraser demands to know who told the police about the job, and Liz is terrified when he lays into her. Ken warns Sue that people are gossiping about them

programme.title: Classic Emmerdale
programme.desc: Ned and Roy wait to see Jan at the police station. Jack and Sarah keep up the pretence that they are still together in front of the social worker

programme.title: Classic Emmerdale
programme.desc: Jack uses the situation with an Andy as an excuse to move back home. Ned speaks to a psychiatrist about Jan. Steve catches Kim on the phone arranging to meet the blackmailer

programme.title: Heartbeat
programme.desc: A prisoner is broken out of Ashfordly prison to pilot a helicopter on a secret mission, and Debbie begins acting strangely when a familiar face returns to the village. Meanwhile, Rob is left distraught when a boy takes revenge for the death of his dog

programme.title: Bless This House
programme.desc: Sid believes he is in for a fortune when a friend mentions him in his will. Comedy, starring Sid James and Diana Coupland

programme.title: Bless This House
programme.desc: Sally and Mike enter the junk market and use the garden to store their wares - until Sid puts his foot down. Comedy, starring Sally Geeson and Robin Stewart

programme.title: That's My Boy
programme.desc: Tongues are set wagging when the house on the hill changes hands

programme.title: The Darling Buds of May
programme.desc: The first episode of the whimsical rural drama based on HE Bates' novels. Tax collector Cedric Charlton visits the Larkin household intent on getting the head of the family - Pop - to correctly fill out his tax forms. In so doing he falls for attractive daughter Mariette. Starring David Jason, Pam Ferris and Catherine Zeta-Jones

programme.title: The Durrells
programme.desc: The family prepares for a celebration, and Margo is determined to persuade the reclusive Countess Mavrodaki to attend. Sven is put to the test by his potential family, but seems to make a good impression. Gerry begins to question whether keeping animals in his personal zoo is fair, and considers releasing them into the wild

programme.title: Heartbeat
programme.desc: A Frenchwoman arrives to help with preparations for Aidensfield's twinning with her home town, but things go wrong when she is left to the tender mercies of Peggy. programme.desc: Liz gives Gerry the slip and runs out of The Hourglass before turning to Jim for help. Ken tells Sue he needs his teaching salary to keep seeing Daniel in Scotland

programme.title: Midsomer Murders
programme.desc: A man's apparent suicide in an armoured car shocks the village of Morton Fendle, but things take a more sinister turn upon the discovery he was not alone when he died. programme.desc: Mandy tries to convince Kelly to tell Biff about the baby. Biff wants to make his peace with the Glovers. Zoe watches the video of Kim and Daniels

programme.title: Classic Coronation Street
programme.desc: Ken is astounded to be told Sue has resigned and left the school. Liz meets with Fraser and agrees to give him an alibi for the night of the warehouse raid

programme.title: Classic Coronation Street
programme.desc: Long-running drama with the residents of England's most famous cobbled street

programme.title: Midsomer Murders
programme.desc: When a family glassware business collapses following the death of one of its partners, Barnaby investigates allegations of financial irregularities, love triangles and a string of murders. Lapsed Freemason Jones uses his inside knowledge to explore the ceremonial aspects of two killings, but it is Cully's production of Hamlet that gives Tom the key to the mystery. John Nettles, Jason Hughes, Jane Wymark and Laura Howard star

programme.title: Inspector Morse
programme.desc: The Oxford sleuth investigates a double mystery connected to the local Greek community - the death of a restaurant chef and the disappearance of a baby - and wonders whether an academic event attended by some of the university's leading classical scholars could shed light on the case. Mystery, starring John Thaw and Kevin Whately, with Jan Harvey, Martin Jarvis and James Hazeldine

programme.title: Doc Martin
programme.desc: Ruth is concerned about becoming increasingly forgetful, and is even more perturbed when Martin offers to perform a mini mental state examination. It confirms she is showing early signs of dementia. Meanwhile, Louisa plans a special evening to celebrate Martin's birthday, and Al decides to throw Morwenna a surprise engagement party on the same night. There are also problems when Louisa's class tutorial ends in disaster. Comedy drama, starring Martin Clunes, Caroline Catz and Eileen Atkins

programme.title: Endeavour
programme.desc: The detective is assigned to investigate when a chocolate factory owner is murdered during a fox hunt. The case leads him to the sleepy Oxfordshire village of Chigton Green, and is soon complicated by the fatal shooting of a local couple with an apparent connection to the first victim. Endeavour uncovers a vicious campaign of gossip and rumour, and meets a local woman who inspires him to consider his future

programme.title: Grantchester
programme.desc: Geordie suspects foul play when computer laboratory head Professor Simms keels over and dies from mercury poisoning. It seems the deceased recently spent the night in the lab with someone other than his wife, possibly a fellow educated man. Geordie seeks advice from Leonard, and the pair start to uncover the surprisingly messy love lives of Simms' colleagues. Elsewhere, Cathy is brutally tricked, Will returns to Grantchester and Mrs C makes a shocking discovery. Drama, starring Robson Green and Tom Brittney

programme.title: Inspector Morse
programme.desc: Lewis joins Morse on a trip to Australia, but it is no holiday - they are pursuing a former supergrass who holds the key to a mystery back in Oxford. Going deep into the heart of the Outback, Morse soon begins to miss the comforts of home, particularly his regular tipple, although Lewis finds he has more in common with his Aussie brethren than he thought. Crime drama, starring John Thaw, Kevin Whately and Con O'Neill

programme.title: ITV3 Nightscreen
programme.desc: Text-based information service

programme.title: Teleshopping
programme.desc: Buying goods from the comfort of home

programme.title: Only When I Laugh
programme.desc: Figgis is dismissive when Archie and Norman play a game of poker, believing that skill has nothing to do with it and it is all really down to luck. Comedy, with James Bolam and Peter Bowles

programme.title: The Saint
programme.desc: Templar is asked to take a diamond to Amsterdam for recutting - but crooks are determined to get their hands on it by any means necessary. Classic adventure, guest starring TP McKenna and Terence Rigby

programme.title: Robin of Sherwood
programme.desc: Part one of two. Robin and the outlaws leave Sherwood to defend a distant village from a band of phantom horsemen known as the Hounds of Lucifer, who terrorise the countryside on the orders of a powerful coven ruled by Morgwyn of Ravenscar. Guest starring Rula Lenska

programme.title: Dempsey and Makepeace
programme.desc: The unlikely duo investigate a case of caviar smuggling that led to murder. Feature-length episode of the detective thriller, starring Glynis Barber and Michael Brandon

programme.title: The Professionals
programme.desc: CI5 investigates a judge's death and finds a connection with a deadly terrorist group of young middle-class drop-outs that has declared war on the legal system. On catching one of its number, Bodie and Doyle learn of a bomb due to explode in a courthouse. Drama, starring Martin Shaw and Lewis Collins

programme.title: The Sweeney
programme.desc: The university branch of a bank is robbed, and though Regan and the Flying Squad catch most of the gang a known killer and his sidekick remain inside holding the manager and two women hostage. John Thaw and Dennis Waterman star

programme.title: The Saint
programme.desc: Simon Templar is persuaded to shadow a defecting civil servant who has been duped into carrying confidential papers to East Germany. Guest starring Ronald Hines

programme.title: Robin of Sherwood
programme.desc: Part two of two. Robert of Huntingdon assumes the mantle of Robin Hood as the re-formed band of outlaws resolves to rescue Marion from Clun. Fantasy drama, starring Jason Connery, with Ray Winstone, Judi Trott and Phil Davis

programme.title: The Avengers
programme.desc: When the Ministry is broken into by an apparently invisible man, it seems a secret formula has fallen into the hands of an organisation run by Soviet Intelligence. Light-hearted action, starring Patrick Macnee and Diana Rigg

programme.title: Minder
programme.desc: Arthur celebrates a reunion with old army pal Yorkie. However, after a particularly hard drinking session the visitor loses both his trousers and his bearings, leaving it up to Terry to track him down before his wife is made aware of the situation. Brian Glover guest stars, with George Cole and Dennis Waterman

programme.title: The Professionals
programme.desc: Cowley and the team are confused by a chain of events that involves lethal narcotics, a series of killings and a drug addict. As they piece the clues together, Bodie and Doyle realise someone has a plan to flood the public water supply with lethal hallucenogenic drugs. Drama, starring Martin Shaw, Lewis Collins and Gordon Jackson

programme.title: The Sweeney
programme.desc: Two former cellmates attempt to throw a suspicious Regan off their trail by pretending that they have fallen out and that one has murdered the other. Maureen Lipman guests stars, with John Thaw and Dennis Waterman

programme.title: Tenable
programme.desc: Five bed specialists answer questions on subjects including Blue Peter, capital cities and Robert De Niro films, then try to score a perfect 10 in the final round to take home the prize money. Quiz, hosted by Warwick Davis

programme.title: Griff's Great Australian Adventure
programme.desc: Comedian, actor and travel enthusiast Griff Rhys Jones boards the trains of Australia to explore Down Under, covering thousands of miles from surfers' beaches to dusty outback. On the first leg he journeys from Perth to Kalgoorlie on board the Indian Pacific, discovering Western Australia's riches, and asking - what is a sandgroper?

programme.title: The Bourne Identity (2002)
programme.desc: A fishing boat crew plucks a man out of the sea with two bullet wounds in his back and a safety-deposit number sewn into his skin - but absolutely no memory of who he is or how he got there. In the search for his true identity, he is pursued by assassins - but his skill at evading them suggests his own past is far from straightforward. Thriller, starring Matt Damon, Franka Potente, Chris Cooper, Clive Owen and Brian Cox

However, the mysterious disappearance of a woman connected to the case forces the unlikely duo to work together, leading them to uncover a government conspiracy. Crime comedy, starring Russell Crowe and Ryan Gosling

programme.title: Dempsey and Makepeace
programme.desc: An antique necklace and a conspiracy of desperate men drag the duo into the shady world of gambling. Police drama, starring Michael Brandon and Glynis Barber

programme.title: Minder
programme.desc: Arthur loses a fortune in cash when his wine supplier is mugged and the money he entrusted is stolen. To add insult to injury the dodgy entrepreneur becomes the prime suspect for the attack, leading him and Terry on a mission to prove his innocence. George Cole stars

programme.title: The Professionals
programme.desc: Bodie and Doyle investigate the murder of a prostitute, but their only clues are a pornographic film and a Eastern bloc-backed plot to blackmail a prominent politician tipped to become a future prime minister. Drama, starring Martin Shaw and Lewis Collins

programme.title: The Sweeney
programme.desc: Suspected felon Billy Medhurst returns from Spain, and Regan determines to prove his involvement in an earlier robbery in which a Sweeney office was shot and left permanently disabled. Police drama, starring John Thaw, Dennis Waterman and Anthony Heaton

programme.title: Tenable
programme.desc: Warwick Davis hosts the quiz, in which five old school friends from Middlesex answer questions about top 10 lists then try to score a perfect 10 in the final round to take home the prize money

programme.title: The Motorbike Show
programme.desc: Henry Cole takes a wild ride through Gran Canaria, and visits the Morgan factory to learn about their iconic three wheelers and what they are like to ride. The presenters also track down a rare 1970s Chopper to restore

programme.title: Casino Royale (2006)
programme.desc: James Bond achieves his '00' status and is dispatched on the trail of Le Chiffre, an international criminal financing terrorist organisations around the world. Bond's investigation leads to a casino in Montenegro, where he takes part in a high-stakes poker game in a bid to bankrupt Le Chiffre and put an end to his plans. Spy thriller, directed by Martin Campbell and starring Daniel Craig in his first outing as 007, with Eva Green, Mads Mikkelsen, Judi Dench and Giancarlo Giannini

programme.title: Blade Runner 2049 (2017)

Denis Villeneuve's Oscar-winning sci-fi thriller, the sequel to Ridley Scott's 1982 classic, starring Ryan Gosling, Harrison Ford, Ana de Armas and Sylvia Hoeks

programme.title: The Saint
programme.desc: Simon Templar poses as a jailbird in an attempt to learn who is responsible for organising a series of audacious mass prison escapes. Vintage drama, guest starring Donald Sutherland, with Roger Moore

programme.title: Robin of Sherwood
programme.desc: The men send for Marion when Robert is badly wounded in a raid. Meanwhile, the Sheriff of Nottingham is eager to prove that Robert is the outlaws' leader - already being referred to by the people as Robin Hood

programme.title: Dempsey and Makepeace
programme.desc: In order to investigate a villain's idea of the perfect crime, Harriet poses as a prostitute and Jim goes up in the world. Police drama, starring Michael Brandon and Glynis Barber

programme.title: Minder
programme.desc: Terry tries to help his friend Kate evict some unwanted tenants, but comes to doubt her motives. Meanwhile, Arthur is desperate to get into the property market and tries to sell Terry's flat without telling him. Guest starring Toyah Willcox and Simon Cadell

programme.title: The Professionals
programme.desc: CI5 uncovers a plan to hold the home secretary hostage in order to demand the release of a dangerous prisoner. Cowley takes the politician's place at an award ceremony, hoping that with Bodie as his bodyguard, he can draw the enemy into the open and thwart the attempt. Drama, starring Martin Shaw, Gordon Jackson and Lewis Collins, and featuring Pamela Stephenson in an early role

programme.title: The Sweeney
programme.desc: Regan is joined by an old friend - Turkish policeman Captain Shebbeq - to help him track down a gold-smuggling ring. As he observes a secret government deal to transport the precious commodity, he comes to suspect there is something rather sinister also within the cargo. Nadim Sawalha guest stars, with John Thaw

programme.title: Tenable
programme.desc: A mother and her four children tackle questions about top 10 lists from the realms of pop culture and general knowledge, then try to score a perfect 10 in the final round to take home the prize money. Quiz, hosted by Warwick Davis

programme.title: Heathrow: Britain's Busiest Airport
programme.desc: Hoards of Russian school children returning home from British boarding schools travel through Heathrow, while a huge mobile crane that stops in the middle of a live airfield causes problems. Documentary series going behind the scenes of the airport, finding out how its infrastructure helps staff process thousands of passengers arriving from 84 countries

programme.title: Heathrow: Britain's Busiest Airport
programme.desc: Documentary series going behind the scenes of the airport, finding out how its infrastructure helps staff process thousands of passengers arriving from 84 countries. This time, A potential people trafficker is flagged up to the Border Force, and the polar vortex that hit Britain in March 2018 causes havoc in the airport

programme.title: The Motorbike Show
programme.desc: Henry Cole's Mediterranean odyssey continues with a ride through southern Spain. Back home, the restoration of the 1970 Chopper gathers pace, and Henry also gets a sneak peak at the latest models from AJS

programme.title: Pale Rider (1985)
programme.desc: An unscrupulous landowner threatens to throw gold-miners off their land and take the riches for himself. As the law turns a blind eye to their troubles, the miners desperately need a saviour - who happens to arrive in the form of a mysterious preacher with formidable gunfighting skills. Western, directed by and starring Clint Eastwood, alongside Michael Moriarty, Carrie Snodgress and Richard Dysart

programme.title: Lethal Weapon
programme.desc: A brutal car accident reveals that Cahill is being targeted by a murderous stalker, enabling Murtaugh and Riggs to turn to the tables and start asking her a few probing questions for a change - though the doctor insists on taking an active role in helping solve the case. Riggs begins to obsess over Murtaugh's past after finding his file in Cahill's office, while family man Roger and wife Trish locate their daughter's fake ID. Damon Wayans, Clayne Crawford and Jordana Brewster star in this fast-paced series, based on the hit, big-screen movie

programme.title: Casino Royale (2006)
programme.desc: James Bond achieves his '00' status and is dispatched on the trail of Le Chiffre, an international criminal financing terrorist organisations around the world. Bond's investigation leads to a casino in Montenegro, where he takes part in a high-stakes poker game in a bid to bankrupt Le Chiffre and put an end to his plans. Spy thriller, directed by Martin Campbell and starring Daniel Craig in his first outing as 007, with Eva Green, Mads Mikkelsen, Judi Dench and Giancarlo Giannini

programme.desc: Nick Hewer and Rachel Riley host the words-and-numbers game where contestants pit their wits against the clock. Rufus Hound is in Dictionary Corner with Susie Dent

programme.title: A Place in the Sun
programme.desc: Angie and Neelesh met 30 years ago on the London Underground, and now with retirement on the horizon they think the time is right to buy a holiday home in their favourite Spanish town of Estepona. The couple have their hearts set on a new build property and have asked Laura Hamilton to help find them the perfect one. Laura lines up various options for their maximum budget of £260,000, but will any impress them enough to make an offer?

programme.title: Escape to the Chateau: DIY
programme.desc: Phillip aims to transform three derelict rooms at Chateau de la Fare into the perfect bridal suite for his daughter Penny's wedding in three months' time

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: The competition begins at Bowlees Farm Holiday Cottages in Co Durham, where Tony and Viv Smith hope that their tranquil setting, hot tubs and indoor swimming pool impresses

programme.title: Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: Personal assistant Lisa hosts the first of five parties from in and around Birmingham, hoping her Malaysian-themed menu will impress other contestants Akil, Sonia, Martha and Mark

programme.title: The Simpsons
programme.desc: When all the fast-food restaurants in Springfield start serving healthy meals, Homer turns to the last bastion of greasy food for comfort - and digs up some childhood memories. And Lisa must find a good news story when the future of her school radio station is in jeopardy

programme.title: Hollyoaks
programme.desc: Ste offers Jordan some home truths, and Mitchell encourages Martine to go on a date, renewing Toby's resentment towards his brother

programme.title: Channel 4 News
programme.desc: Including sport and weather

programme.title: Rory Peck Awards
programme.desc: Nominees for the award onouring the freelance TV cameramen and women who bring the world's stories to the screen, beginning with a look at the work of finalist Sasha Joelle Achilli. She reveals how she focused on a single A&E doctor's world - at home and at work - to create an account of Europe's first devastating encounter with the Covid-19 virus

programme.title: Dispatches
programme.desc: In the month when the worlds' leaders should have been gathering in Glasgow to tackle global warming, Sophie Morgan investigates the carbon footprint of the technology industry and tests some of the environmental claims of some of the biggest names in the tech world. She also recruits two families to keep a diary of their online habits and together they discover some shocking truths about the hidden cost of their online habits

programme.title: Food Unwrapped Investigates
programme.desc: Kate Quilton investigates the junk-food diets of children who are fussy eaters, visiting one of the largest studies into childhood eating habits in the world to find out what is reasonable to categorise as normal behaviour and when parents should seek help. She learns about a newly discovered eating disorder that has so far been largely undiagnosed and could be behind thousands of cases of fussy eating in the UK

programme.title: Lockdown Chaos: How the Government Lost Control
programme.desc: In July, the Prime Minister said he hoped life would be normal again by Christmas, but now most of the UK is under lockdown. What happened? Antony Barnett investigates the second wave of Covid-19, looking at how the government lost control and revealing new evidence about companies making millions from the pandemic

programme.title: 24 Hours in Police Custody: The Home County Cartel
programme.desc: Part one of two. The documentary focuses on the importation of huge quantities of Class A drugs, following the work of covert detectives from the Eastern Region Special Operation Unit. A consignment weighing more than 100kg has been intercepted while being imported into the UK from Europe. To reveal who is behind this, an undercover operation is authorised to closely monitor the shipment, using audio and visual equipment, as it travels to its final destination at a farm in rural Hertfordshire

programme.title: 24 Hours in Police Custody: The Home County Cartel
programme.desc: Part two of two. The covert team tries to find the true identity of Jaguar Palace, as well as the evidence to link the suspect directly to the drug-importing conspiracy. The detectives begin a nerve-shredding wait for the criminal network to set up its lucrative operation again, and stand ready to strike against the ringleaders when it does

programme.title: Educating Greater Manchester
programme.desc: Year eight student Rani decides to play a Valentine's prank on his best friend Jack, but the strength of their friendship is put to the test after an incident in the playground. Meanwhile, the search to find the new head girl concludes and the winner is finally revealed to staff and students, and year 11 pupil Chelci has a falling out with best friend, Cheyenne

programme.title: The Great British Bake Off: An Extra Slice
programme.desc: Jo Brand is joined by Kathy Burke, Jools Holland and Sophie Duker to look back at the highs and lows of dessert week and meet the unfortunate contestant who wobbled a little too much in the jelly art cake signature. There's also extra footage and photos of the curious so-called cakes that eager amateurs have been creating at home. With Tom Allen

programme.title: Crazy Delicious
programme.desc: Jayde Adams presents the culinary contest, with astrophysics enthusiast Harry, flavour maverick Elainea and Italian dessert specialist Gabi taking up the challenge to come up with new twists on classic dishes. The first two challenges see them pushed to come up with a unique recipe involving apples and their own take on spaghetti bolognese. After the first two challenges, one contestant will be eliminated and the remaining two must prepare brunch for judges Heston Blumenthal, Niklas Ekstedt and Carla Hall

programme.title: Ramsay's Kitchen Nightmares USA
programme.desc: Gordon Ramsay gives his advice to Paul Bazzini, an award-winning chef from New York who now owns a restaurant in Ridgewood, New Jersey. Paul confesses he has lost his passion for food and is struggling to keep up with the business, a situation that seems evident to other members of staff, his wife and customers

programme.title: Fifteen to One

programme.desc: Norm lands a new job with a prestigious Boston accountancy firm, but it is not quite as glamorous as he makes it out to be. George Wendt stars

programme.title: Cheers

programme.desc: Marie starts wearing glasses and begins to see the family in a new light, while Robert gets back together with Amy and invites her to a Thanksgiving dinner. Doris Roberts, Ray Romano and Brad Garrett star

programme.desc: Frank blithely starts helping himself to the snacks on sale in a local supermarket - much to the anger of the manager, who wastes no time in confronting him. Comedy, starring Peter Boyle, with Jeff Garlin

programme.desc: Part one of two. While visiting the island of Bora Bora with new girlfriend Madeline, Frasier is unexpectedly reunited with his ex-wife Lilith. Comedy, guest starring JoBeth Williams and Bebe Neuwirth

It's far from easy as Mariam struggles to find enough material to make curtains and finds out that a custom-made mattress doesn't fit an antique bed. programme.desc: Anna Richardson welcomes two more people looking for love to take their pick from six nude candidates. programme.title: Happy as Lazzaro (2018)
programme.desc: In an isolated village dominated by a ruling aristocrat, an imaginative young noble strikes up a friendship with a gentle peasant. In Italian and English

programme.title: 24 Hours in A&E
programme.desc: Featuring the stories of three patients filmed at St George's in south London, including a retired air stewardess who was rushed into hospital after seriously cutting her leg as her best friend's 70th birthday party. programme.desc: Three of Europe's most talented dancers take off on a global quest to find the beating heart and cultural roots of street dance. programme.title: The Yorkshire Vet

A rare cattle breeder waits for the pregnancy test results on his Jack Russell

programme.title: The Great Plague: Outbreak
programme.desc: Xand van Tulleken, Raksha Dave and John Sergeant trace the spread of the Great Plague of 1665 week by week and discover parallels with the coronavirus. In the first episode, the epidemic is traced back to its source in the parish of St Giles in the Fields, now at the heart of London's theatre district. The programme also examines the symptoms of the disease and uncovers new research into the plague bacteria that could overthrow accepted ideas about how the infection was spread

programme.title: The Missing Evidence
programme.desc: The identity of one of history's most notorious serial killers has generated many theories over the years since the three-month period in 1888 when a number of women were murdered on the streets of Whitechapel. Journalist Christer Holmgren believes that he has found a suspect who can not only be linked directly to one of the murders, but also whose daily routine could be consistent with all the other deaths. Having studied the case for more than three decades, his focus eventually fell on a witness called Charles Cross, whose real name turned out to be Charles Allen Lechmere, and he found a mass of incriminating evidence

programme.title: Inside
programme.desc: Exploring the world's ultra-luxury property market. Cameras follow luxury estate agent to the rich and famous, Shawn Elliot, who is based in Los Angeles, as he goes on the hunt for a home for a mystery billionaire. Meanwhile, in Beverly Hills, Freedom Jacob Cesar is revamping his $10 million pad, decking it out in designer gear in the hope of making a huge profit

programme.title: Filthy House SOS
programme.desc: Cleaning duo Richard and Brennan take on some of Britain's filthiest and most cluttered homes. They begin with Lincolnshire single mum, Sam, who has dedicated her life to caring for her disabled daughter, leaving no time for cleaning

programme.title: The Great Plague: Decimation
programme.desc: Xand van Tulleken, Raksha Dave and John Sergeant trace the spread of the Great Plague of 1665 week by week and discover parallels with the coronavirus. In the second episode, Xand heads to St Barts hospital to look back at historical records which show that nursing staff stayed behind and risked their lives to help the sick. Elsewhere, John investigates why infection rates were so different between the rich and poor, examining clothes typical for each group in the 17th century

programme.title: Lord Mountbatten: Hero or Villain?
programme.desc: When Louis Mountbatten, the Queen's cousin and Prince Philip's uncle, was murdered by the IRA in 1979 he was lauded as a war hero, an elder statesman and a much-loved member of the royal family. But did the public perception disguise the truth? As a military leader he was responsible for significant loss of life, while as a statesman he was responsible for the badly planned and poorly executed partition of India, which still has repercussions today

programme.title: The World's Most Luxurious Prison
programme.desc: Presenter Ann Widdecombe takes a look inside Norway's Halden Prison, where inmates share plush flats, dine on sushi and even record rap records. While its humane approach has been revered by some, Halden Prison has been accused by others of being too luxurious. Ann spends three days meeting staff, talking to inmates and assessing whether the level of luxury is justified

programme.title: Criminals: Caught on Camera
programme.desc: Journalist Nick Wallis joins police forces around the nation to discover how CCTV and technological advances are helping to bring criminals to justice. The programme reveals how essential surveillance cameras have become in the fight against crime and features footage of people caught red-handed

programme.title: Retreat, Hell! (1952)
programme.desc: US Marines have to battle their way through a frozen mountain pass despite dwindling supplies and continual enemy attacks. Korean War drama, made while the conflict was still raging, starring Frank Lovejoy, Anita Louise, Richard Carlson and Russ Tamblyn

programme.title: Only the Valiant (1951)
programme.desc: A tough cavalry officer selects six unlikely comrades to undertake a vital mission to defend an isolated fort against marauding Apaches. His men's initial hostility soon turns to respect, however, as they realise his wily ways will see them through the conflict. Western adventure based on a novel by Charles Marquis Warren, starring Gregory Peck, Barbara Payton, Ward Bond and Lon Chaney Jr

programme.title: Two Thousand Women (1944)
programme.desc: Female prisoners struggle to cope with living in a German internment camp, but find common cause in making life difficult for their captors. When three British airmen are shot down over the prison, they keep them hidden from the Germans while plotting a way to smuggle them out safely. Second World War comedy, with Phyllis Calvert, Flora Robson, Patricia Roc and Renee Houston

programme.title: Pony Express (1953)
programme.desc: Buffalo Bill Cody and Wild Bill Hickok work on establishing an east-west route for the pioneering mail service that will allow messages to be sent from Missouri to California in 10 days. However, they have to contend with saboteurs planning to prevent California becoming part of the Union. Western, starring Charlton Heston, Forrest Tucker, Rhonda Fleming and Jan Sterling

programme.title: Eye in the Sky (2015)
programme.desc: Colonel Katherine Powell's mission to wipe out a terrorist cell in Kenya is complicated when a girl enters the blast radius of the intended drone strike. Powell has to decide between sacrificing the girl's life or letting the terrorists flee to carry out more atrocities. Thriller, starring Helen Mirren, Alan Rickman and Aaron Paul

programme.title: Central Intelligence (2016)
programme.desc: Action comedy, starring Dwayne Johnson as a one-time geek who suffered constant humiliation at high school but grew up to be a lethal CIA agent. But when he is targeted by his own organisation, he comes home for a high school reunion, where he enlists the help of the former campus tough guy - now a meek accountant - who very quickly wonders what he has got himself into. Co-starring Kevin Hart and Amy Ryan

programme.title: Shoplifters (2018)
programme.desc: A poverty-stricken group living in Tokyo makes ends meet by shoplifting. One night they take a troubled little girl under their wing, and when police start investigating her disappearance, the family attempts to hide her from the authorities. Drama, starring Lily Franky, Sakura Ando and Mayu Matsuoka. In Japanese

programme.title: Like Father, Like Son (2013)
programme.desc: A hard-working family man discovers that his six-year-old son was accidentally mixed up with another baby at birth. As he considers how to resolve the situation, the devotion of his wife and the other family involved to the children they have raised makes him wonder if he has been a good father. Drama, starring Masaharu Fukuyama and Machiko Ono. In Japanese

programme.title: The Spy in Black (1939)
programme.desc: A German spy falls for an apparently sympathetic schoolteacher during a First World War mission, unaware the object of his affections is in fact an English double agent, a situation that threatens to jeopardise an operation to destroy the British fleet in the Orkneys in 1917. Powell and Pressburger's romantic drama, starring Conrad Veidt, Valerie Hobson and Marius Goring

programme.title: The Great Sioux Massacre (1965)
programme.desc: A corrupt senator coaxes Colonel Custer out of retirement with the prospect of presidential office, and the soldier tries to further his political ambitions by wresting control of the current military campaign from its commanding officer, culminating in his last stand at the Battle of the Little Bighorn. Western, with Philip Carey, Joseph Cotten, Darren McGavin and Julie Sommars

programme.title: Pimpernel Smith (1941)
programme.desc: An unassuming English professor working on an archaeological dig in Germany leads a double life helping enemies of the Nazi regime escape the country. Second World War adventure based on The Scarlet Pimpernel, directed by and starring Leslie Howard, with Francis L Sullivan, Mary Morris, Hugh McDermott, Raymond Huntley and Manning Whiley

programme.title: Two Rode Together (1961)
programme.desc: The desperate relatives of people captured by Comanches many years before put pressure on the US military to bring them home. The army hires a cynical frontier marshal, who agrees to negotiate their release in return for a commission. But the townsfolk are forced to face some grim truths when he returns with just one unrecognisable captive. John Ford's Western, with James Stewart, Richard Widmark and Shirley Jones

programme.title: Fantastic Four: Rise of the Silver Surfer (2007)
programme.desc: The super-powered team takes on a mysterious alien who has been sent by his planet-eating master to prepare Earth for obliteration. While the four heroes try to find a way to foil its plans, an old enemy returns, intent on seizing the extraterrestrial's power. Sci-fi adventure sequel, starring Ioan Gruffudd, Michael Chiklis, Chris Evans and Jessica Alba, with the voice of Laurence Fishburne

programme.title: Hitman: Agent 47 (2015)
programme.desc: The latest in a long line of genetically engineered clones bred to be the perfect assassin takes on a mission that strikes close to home. A corporation intends to use the technology that created him to build an army of superhuman killers. As the assassin fights to bring them down, he uncovers the dark secrets surrounding his origin. Action thriller, starring Rupert Friend, Hannah Ware and Zachary Quinto

programme.title: Little Fockers (2010)
programme.desc: Nurse Greg is now the proud father of twins, but has yet to earn the respect of his wife's stern father after 10 years of marriage. The couple invite both sides of their extended family to the kids' birthday party, where Greg makes a desperate effort to finally prove his worth to his father-in-law. Comedy sequel, with Ben Stiller, Robert De Niro, Owen Wilson and Dustin Hoffman

programme.title: I Wish (2011)
programme.desc: A 12-year-old boy lives with his divorced mother, while his brother lives with his father in a different part of the country. When a bullet train line is built connecting the two towns, he starts to believe that when the first trains pass each other, a miracle will occur - which he hopes will reunite his family. Drama, starring real-life brothers Koki and Ohshiro Maeda. In Japanese

programme.title: Random Acts
programme.desc: A collection of exciting new films from cutting-edge black filmmakers, this time featuring Rikki Henry's short film Venus/Mars

programme.title: Blanche Fury (1948)
programme.desc: A penniless governess is invited to stay with a wealthy relative, where she hopes to secure her future and take over the estate by marrying her infatuated cousin. However, her secret romance with a stablehand has tragic consequences for all concerned. Drama, starring Valerie Hobson, Michael Gough, Stewart Granger and Walter Fitzgerald

programme.title: The Fighting Seabees (1944)
programme.desc: Construction workers battle against Japanese forces while working with the US navy in the South Pacific during the Second World War, while the head of the company and an officer compete for the affections of a local woman. However, when one recklessly causes a tragedy, he seeks redemption by launching an attack on a tank battalion. Drama, starring John Wayne, Susan Hayward and Dennis O'Keefe

programme.title: Bitter Victory (1957)
programme.desc: Two British officers are assigned to lead a raid on a German stronghold in Libya and steal secret documents. However, one of the pair suspects the other of having had an affair with his wife and the tension between them threatens the mission. Second World War drama, starring Richard Burton, Curt Jurgens, Ruth Roman and Christopher Lee

programme.title: Comanche Station (1960)
programme.desc: A cowboy recruits a trio of outlaws to rescue a woman held captive at a Comanche camp and reunite her with her husband in return for a large reward. However, his partners decide the bounty should be split three ways rather than four and plan to double-cross him. Western, starring Randolph Scott, Nancy Gates, Claude Akins and Skip Homeier

programme.title: Stargate (1994)
programme.desc: An Egyptologist and a soldier head an expedition through a mysterious portal to an alien planet. The world they find resembles ancient Egypt and is under the rule of a tyrant who has convinced the downtrodden inhabitants that he is a god - until the humans incite the enslaved populace to fight back. Sci-fi adventure, starring Kurt Russell, James Spader and Jaye Davidson

programme.title: The Post (2017)
programme.desc: In 1971, an American military analyst uncovers the depths of the US government's deceptions about the futility of the Vietnam War, and takes action by copying top-secret documents that would become the Pentagon Papers. Washington Post owner Kay Graham and her editor Ben Bradlee discover The New York Times is preparing an explosive expose on those papers and, determined to compete, set out to publish them first. Steven Spielberg's fact-based drama, starring Meryl Streep, Tom Hanks, Sarah Paulson and Bob Odenkirk

programme.title: Terminator Genisys (2015)
programme.desc: A soldier fighting in a post-apocalyptic war against living machines is sent back in time to prevent an attempt to change the past - but when he arrives, he finds that history has been changed beyond recognition - and that a plot is being hatched by an unexpected enemy to destroy the future of the human race. Sci-fi adventure sequel, starring Arnold Schwarzenegger and Emilia Clarke

programme.title: Area 51 (2015)
programme.desc: Four conspiracy theorists attempt to break into the US air force base in Nevada where they believe their government is hiding evidence of extraterrestrial life. Sci-fi thriller, starring Reid Warner, Darrin Bragg, Ben Rovner and Jelena Nik

programme.title: Random Acts
programme.desc: The film strand dedicated to works by black film-makers continues with Damage Control (Enough), by Abdou Cisse, which aims to burst stereotypes around black male youth culture

programme.desc: Drama following the lives and loves of a group of teenagers and young adults in Chester

programme.title: Sabrina the Teenage Witch
programme.desc: Roland the Troll returns to sweep Sabrina off her feet and away to the Other Realm, while Hilda and Zelda enlist Cupid's help to land Valentine's Day dates. Comedy, starring Melissa Joan Hart

programme.title: Sabrina the Teenage Witch

programme.desc: Sheldon is infuriated when Priya uses her legal knowledge to find a loophole in the room-mate agreement - but his spirits are lifted by a night on the town with Amy, Penny and Bernadette. Comedy, starring Jim Parsons, Johnny Galecki and Kaley Cuoco

programme.title: The Big Bang Theory
programme.desc: Amy and Penny use Bernadette to spy on Leonard and Priya after the couple invite her and Howard to dinner. An experimental drug helps Raj overcome his fear of talking to women, but proves more effective than he had expected. Comedy, starring Johnny Galecki and Jim Parsons

programme.title: Gogglebox
programme.desc: The armchair critics share their opinions on TV from December 2019. The programme captures their reactions to The Crown, Victoria Derbyshire, I'm a Celebrity Get Me Out of Here!, The X Factor: Celebrity, The Andrew Marr Show, Panorama: The Prince and the Epstein Scandal, This Morning and First Dates

programme.title: Taskmaster
programme.desc: In the semi-final, Nish Kumar is presented with a coconut harness, while a blindfolded Sally Phillips handles a slice of bread

programme.title: Angel
programme.desc: The vampire sleuth and friends struggle to survive in the hostile dimension of Pylea, and Cordelia begins to relish her new role as queen of the realm, until she discovers she is duty-bound to mate with the ominously-named Groosalugg. Starring David Boreanaz and Charisma Carpenter

programme.title: First Dates Specials
programme.desc: The restaurant of love throws opens its doors at the most romantic time of the year, as maitre d' Fred Sirieix and his staff hope to help more singletons find their perfect match. Hopefuls include 59-year-old Rachel, who is embarking on her first date with a woman. She quickly takes a shine to Debs - but how will her date feel once she knows Rachel's story? Beauty queen Sophie is keen to prove there is more to her than her Miss Bournemouth title suggests as she sits down with cheeky chappy Bailey, while boxing compere and tattoo artist Jon wants to meet someone who will look past his tough guy exterior

programme.title: The Big Bang Theory
programme.desc: Sheldon's mother comes to visit and woos the gang, but he cannot help feeling jealous of all the attention she is receiving - until a bout of illness lays him low, and he suddenly sees the benefits of having her around. Comedy, starring Jim Parsons

programme.title: The Big Bang Theory
programme.desc: Leonard has doubts about his feelings for Priya when he kisses a girl he meets in the comic-book store, while the rest of the friends play pranks on Sheldon in celebration of Halloween. Comedy, starring Johnny Galecki and Jim Parsons

programme.title: How I Met Your Mother
programme.desc: Ted's attempt to bond with Zoey's husband, the Captain, goes wrong when he finds himself alone with him at sea - and begins to fear for his life. Meanwhile, Marshall tries to conquer his fears about spending time alone with Robin. Sitcom, starring Josh Radnor, with Kyle MacLachlan (Twin Peaks)

programme.title: How I Met Your Mother
programme.desc: News that Marshall and Lily are expecting a child has a profound effect on the gang, while the couple themselves are thrown into a panic. Robin has to choose between two very different jobs, and Barney is torn between making a donation to charity or buying a diamond suit. Comedy, starring Jason Segel and Alyson Hannigan

programme.title: Teleshopping
programme.desc: A chance for viewers to purchase goods from the comfort of home

programme.title: Food Unwrapped
programme.desc: Matt Tebbutt aims to solve the age-old mystery of how to smoothly extract ketchup from a bottle - by running across a pond of custard

programme.title: A Place in the Sun
programme.desc: Jonnie Irwin helps Londoner Trevor, who wants to buy a property on the Maltese island of Gozo and has a budget of £150,000 to spend

programme.title: Find It, Fix It, Flog It
programme.desc: Henry Cole and Simon O'Brien turn an old, unloved filing cabinet into a valuable and desirable storage unit and convert a Bakelite voltmeter into a retro Bluetooth speaker

programme.title: Find It, Fix It, Flog It
programme.desc: Henry Cole and Simon O'Brien search for more gems hidden among unwanted possessions, trying to make a profit from church organ pipes and old leather sports car seats

programme.title: Escape to the Chateau: DIY
programme.desc: Dick Strawbridge and Donna McDougal's search for the armour in the lake continues. Tim and Krys, with the help of Tim's brother Ben, continue in their struggle to get the attic converted in time for the first guests of the season. Dick and his mother-in-law Jenny struggle with preparing and freezing 227kg of pork, before attempting to turn the final 2kg into salamis

programme.title: Building the Dream
programme.desc: Charlie Luxton meets self-building duo Caroline and Chris in south London, who hope to build an urban marvel on a very tight plot

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: Jon and Julia Shorrock host the first round of the B&B competition from their four-star Derwent House in West Sussex. The guests are split by gender to sample the area, with the men firing machine guns at a shooting range and the women relaxing at a spa - but a carpeted bathroom and shower without hot water raise questions

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: Peter and Sharron Sorsky invite their fellow competitors to Kirkby Park B&B in Liverpool, but the presence of a security camera on the outside of the house leaves one guest feeling uneasy. Room inspections uncover all manner of unsightly problems, but a tour of nearby Knowsley Safari Park gives the contestants a chance to enjoy themselves

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: Andy and Julian Banner-Price host the competition at their expensive B&B Plas Dinas Country House in Snowdonia, giving their new guests the priciest rooms. Peter and Sharron Sorsky are still reeling from their feedback forms and immediately find fault with the accommodation, and the group is taken to wash bedding the old-fashioned way at the local slate museum

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: Annette McAnespie welcomes the group to Hazelwood Farm in Crayke, North Yorkshire, for the final B&B visit. The initial impressions are favourable and Peter and Jon begin to bond for the first time during a mosaic class, but not everyone feels up to the planned activity of a cycling tour

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: The contestants meet one last time at Annette McAnespie's farm in Crayke, North Yorkshire, to discover how much they have been paid by their fellow hoteliers and to air their grievances, before the week's winner is announced

programme.title: The Secret Life of the Zoo
programme.desc: Spider monkey Kiara becomes a mother for the first time, but keepers worry that the baby is becoming weak as Kiara appears to be more interested in playing with the other monkeys than taking on maternal responsibilities. Meanwhile, baby capybara Henry enjoys having the attention of all the female capybaras, and Babirusa Sausu moves from paddock to paddock to mate with various females

programme.title: Escape to the Chateau: DIY
programme.desc: In the Pays de la Loire, twenty-something couple Billy and Gwendoline want to open their chateau as a wedding location, but it's not going to plan as the chimney seems to have caught fire. Near Dijon, Clive and Tanith run an upmarket chateau hotel but need to win over the locals, so they put on an open day. Meanwhile, sisters Tanya and Marian prepare to visit their chateau in the Loire Valley. They need to get it ready for the first guests of the summer in less than a week's time, but are faced with everything from dead flies to leaking swimming pools

programme.title: Grand Designs Australia
programme.desc: Peter Maddison meets Tabitha and Chris, who have purchased 120 acres of rainforest in Toolangi and are building a farmhouse that will be completely off grid

programme.title: Grand Designs: The Street
programme.desc: Kevin McCloud follows the last of the self-build projects as husband and wife Godfrey and Pauline seek to downsize from their family home and commission a modular, factory-built home. Once the building arrives on site, it takes just two weeks to be assembled and is ready to move into - only for a problem with the finance to leave them technically homeless. Can they find a solution or will their dreams turn to dust?

programme.title: Building Giants
programme.desc: The construction of the Rose Fitzgerald Kennedy Bridge over the River Barrow in Co Kilkenny, which has two spans of more than 750ft and stands on a purpose-built artificial island

programme.title: Secrets of the Superfactories
programme.desc: The inner workings of cars, chips, toys and toilets as the curtains are pulled back at Maserati, Frito-Lay, Bandai and Armitage Shanks factories

programme.title: 24 Hours in A&E
programme.desc: A 79-year-old woman is airlifted to hospital after being involved in a road traffic collision, with consultants concerned that she may have life-threatening internal bleeding. Meanwhile, 80-year-old Mohammad has come to A&E after falling at home during a family Eid celebratory feast, and 56-year-old Russ is brought in after falling from a ladder while cutting back some trees at work

programme.title: Fatal Flight 447: Chaos in the Cockpit
programme.desc: The story of what really happened on June 1, 2009, when Air France Flight 447 from Rio de Janeiro to Paris plummeted into the Atlantic Ocean, killing all 228 passengers and crew. It remained a mystery how one of the world's most technologically advanced planes could seemingly just drop out of the sky, until a two-year search finally located the black-box recorders. This documentary reveals the scene on board the doomed airliner as the pilots struggled to understand the catastrophe unfolding before them, and asks what lessons have been learnt from the disaster

programme.title: 8 Out of 10 Cats Does Countdown
programme.desc: Jimmy Carr hosts the comedy panel show's version of the words and numbers quiz, with Sean Lock and Victoria Coren Mitchell going up against guest captain Lee Mack and Bob Mortimer. Alex Horne and the Horne Section join Susie Dent in Dictionary Corner, while Rachel Riley looks after the vowels, consonants and numbers

programme.title: The Supervet
programme.desc: A man travels through the night to bring his much-loved Dobermann down from Cumbria to see orthopaedic-neuro veterinary surgeon Noel Fitzpatrick about a diseased spinal cord. Can the professor and his staff bring the canine back to health? Other cases this week are a cocker spaniel rushed in after being hit by a car and a rabbit that needs surgery for a broken ankle

programme.title: Food Unwrapped
programme.desc: A compilation of some of the shows previous investigations. Kate heads to the Amazon rainforest to investigate rumours that the Brazil nuts on UK supermarket shelves are all radioactive. Meanwhile, Matt heads out on the streets to find out how the public feel about eating goat meat, and Jimmy takes to the skies above Israel to join the battle to protect the bell pepper crop from the Mediterranean fruit fly
